text:
Created attachment 173965
Asterisk 13.11.0-RC1 patch

I'm attaching this patch which updates the port to a newer Release Candidate.

You could try with this version, as usual I would not bet on it, but maybe it works better for you.

you can find a changelog here:

http://www.asterisk.org/downloads/news
